title: parinari costata subsp. rubiginosa
intro: Parinari costata subsp. rubiginosa, also known as the Parinari costata, is a plant species in the family Chrysobalanaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Parinari costata subsp. rubiginosa include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-diarrheal effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, or extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments.
